feed.title: SAP Community - HCM (Human Capital Management)
feed.subtitle: HCM (Human Capital Management) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Where can I find learning on the Termination Workbench
entry.content: Hi, I am keen to learn how the Termination Workbench sits together. How is it set up how does it know what to look for when commencing the pay component of the cycle.  Cheers Katja

entry.title: Enchacement for field P2011-PDC_USRUP in t-code PA61
entry.content:
Hi guys,

Hope you are ok .

My requirement is to fill the customer field for time-event, P2011-PDC_USRUP, in t-code PA61, infotype 2011. How can it be implemented? I checked that the name of report is MP200000, but none of the customer exits in there seems relevant for this requirement.

Thank you.

entry.title: How to create Person in HR?
entry.content:
HI HR Guru,

I know how to create Personnel no in HR by PA30.

There is another HR master called Person.

I don't know how to create Person in HR.

Please kindly help.

Sally

entry.title: Time off replication in H4S4 - available enhancements?
entry.content:
Hi,

In the H4S4 time off replication, has there been any facility added (Badi or enhanced  mapping ) when creating IT2001 absence records in SAP on replication from EC?

In our existing BIB configuration there is only the very basic A to B mapping available on absence replication with no ability to include logic or rules. 

Cheers

Brendan

entry.title: ABS_ATT_TYPE_NOT_FOUND runtimr error in CAT2 time entry
entry.content:
• We are creating a new company code 20 for a unit in UAE region and subsequent CATS configuration is in progress.
  • This configuration V_T500P does not allow entry of hours in CAT2 screen and gives runtime error.
  • The run time error vanishes when the HCM Localization parameter is changed from AE to 10. Ideally it should be AE
  • In debug mode we noticed that Molga = AE does not get copied over to MOABW which is a numeric field.

entry.title: Theme Manager - change font colour
entry.content: How can I change the font colour of the menu below the section title? For some sites it is shown correctly and for some not.

entry.title: SOC Standard Occupational Classification Tracking
entry.content:
Hi All, 

We are looking to maintain the standard occupational classification (SOC) in SuccessFactors for USA. But I'm not able to find a standard field in the system. I have checked in Job Classification USA and its not available. Is this something which we have to build as a custom field?

Thanks in advance.

Megan Walter

entry.title: SOC Standard Occupational Classification Tracking
entry.content:
Hi All, 

We are looking to maintain the standard occupational classification (SOC) in SuccessFactors for USA. But I'm not able to find a standard field in the system. I have checked in Job Classification USA and its not available. Is this something which we have to build as a custom field?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Clear Hit List PA20
entry.content: How can I clear the Hit List in the PA20 screen?

entry.title: What regular expressions are available to be used in Secondary Mapping Value conversion from SAP-EC
entry.content:
Good afternoon,

We need to replicate data from SAP ERP to Employee Central, but the data quality is quite a mess.

There are national ID from Molga 39 country (Chile) in different formats,

12.123.123-1

12123123-1

1231231231

 

The valid format would be this:

__.___.___-_

(the first one of the three above)

so i am trying to use value conversion this way,

according to the manual it should work

 

 

 

but is showing errors when replicating in se38

 

it is supposed to find the "-" if any and replace it by an <nbsp> space, the same with the points (\.) and after all, applying the correct format __.___.___-_

but it looks like seq number 1 and 2 (replace using patterns with string/ec field) don´t work if together only work if i delete one of them and leave the other. 

Maybe i need just to write everything in the same line and using a regular expressions as if i was writing ABAP code, but regular expressions like this [.-] are not working in this value conversion.

Therefore i would like to know if there are limitations for the regular expressions in this value conversion tool or they should work the same as if i was using ABAP code.

 

Thanks in advance

regards

entry.title: Delete
entry.content: Delete

entry.title: Person is already being processed by user Service ID S_XI_PX0400
entry.content:
Hi,

WD to SAP Int. Error. Emp is existing in WD but not interfaces to SAP, so trying to manual hire in pA40 but getting below error Please assist on below error 

 

Person is already being processed by user Service ID S_XI_PXxxxx 

Message No. PBAS_SERVICE001

Diagnosis

If two users change a person's data at the same time, the system cannot decide which changes have priority. For this reason, only one user is ever permitted to make changes at any one time.

User Service ID S_XI_PXxxxx is currently editing the person.

System Response

The system does not allow you to edit the person.

Procedure

Wait until user Service ID S_XI_PXxxxx  has finished editing the person.

Procedure for System Administration

User S_XI_PXxxxx  keeps a lock for lock object EPPRELE 80124140.

entry.title: Anniversary Tile for Managers
entry.content: Has anyone set up an Anniversary Alert Tile on the Home Page alerting managers of their employees' anniversary dates and years of service? If so, do you have any lessons learned, KBAs, or resources you could share based on your experience in setting it up? Thank you!

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite Can realize bidirectional data transfer between HCM and EC？
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a question about SAP Integration Suite. Currently, we have established a unidirectional data flow from HCM to SF_EC via SAP Integration Suite. I am keen to understand whether SAP Integration Suite can be augmented to support bidirectional data exchange, thereby enabling modifications made in SF_EC to be seamlessly reflected back in our HCM system.

In contemplating this two-way transmission, I am also mindful of potential data integrity concerns, specifically the risk of data collisions or inconsistencies that might arise during concurrent updates. Could you shed light on SAP Integration Suite's mechanisms for handling such scenarios, ensuring that data coherence and accuracy are preserved throughout the process?

That's my confusion.


Thanks and regards,

PanPan

entry.title: ESS & MSS ON S4HANA
entry.content:
Hello All,

Can anyone let me know how to configure ESS & MSS in S4 HANA.

entry.title: Data Fields Definitions
entry.content:
Hello:

I can not get access to the data fields definitions within the solution scenarios for HCM.  Is there a reason why?  The link is dead.  Do you need permissions?  For example below

Data Fields Definition:  Employment Details Imports | SAP Help Portal

Page Not Found | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Do you use SuccessFactors employee Directory as WhosWho ?
entry.content:
Do you use SuccessFactors Employee Directory 

as a Personnel List,

List of Staff,

Who’s Who 

in your organization ?

if not, what was the gap you have identified to match these needs ?

Some actions can be customized to call Directory, and these make it a more friendly tool,

 but other configuration sides seems complex to maintain over time, so we are curious to know about these parts from customers who went into these journey.

entry.title: zinfotype for pp01 in OM HCM
entry.content:
hello dear consultants

i want to add a zinfotype in pp01

I have configured the aspects and country-specific sections for this infotype, and I have also configured table T777I. However, I cannot see the infotype in my list in PP01. I should mention that I can see this infotype in PP02.

Does anyone have a solution for this issue?

entry.title: Report Center - Last Report Run Date
entry.content:
Hi there,

We are currently working on implementing People Analytics and I will need to migrate some of our reports from report center.  Is there a way to see when a report was last run.  We have over 700 reports created, but only want to migrate those that have been run in the past year.

Thank you!

entry.title: How to download a data change report for Comp and Job info after particular date
entry.content:
Hi,

I am working on building a report for another 3P tool for variable payout for incentive schemes which is based on employee's org details and salary details.

When we build an adhoc report, and want to create a report for the employee data only when there are any changes made to the employee profile in Job or comp info portlet. 

For example, comp changed on 1 Jun 2023 effective 1 Apr 2023 from 100 to 110, and if we pull a report on 2 Jun, only this employee record should come.

another example, if we put the last modified date as 1 Jun 2023, any records updated after 1 Jun 2023 should only be reported for comp or job info. 

Any suggestions to solve this will be appreciated. 

thanks. V
